identity.name: conformance-fixture
identity.sandbox_summary: no filesystem access; loopback transport only

tools.description: Return the fixture's deterministic structured identity document.
tools.name: fixture.identity.describe

tools.description: Return the fixture's stable in-band error without side effects.
tools.name: fixture.error.deterministic

tools.description: Increment the observable fixture counter; destructive and single-use by policy.
tools.name: fixture.effect.increment

tools.description: Read the observable fixture effect counter without mutating it.
tools.name: fixture.effect.count

tools.description: Wait for a bounded duration while honoring cancellation and deadlines.
tools.name: fixture.wait

tools.description: Terminate the fixture process with exit code 86 for recovery tests.
tools.name: fixture.process.crash

tool.description: Returns a stable structured payload used to verify discovery, description, schema projection, invocation, and result decoding without external dependencies.
tool.error_modes: Schema-invalid arguments are rejected before dispatch.
tool.name: fixture.identity.describe

tools.description: Returns a stable structured payload used to verify discovery, description, schema projection, invocation, and result decoding without external dependencies.
tools.name: fixture.identity.describe

tools.description: Always returns the exact deterministic v1 error string for error normalization tests.
tools.name: fixture.error.deterministic

tools.description: Increments an in-memory counter exactly once. Hosts deny this tool to prove policy short-circuits before handler dispatch, then read fixture.effect.count as evidence.
tools.name: fixture.effect.increment

tools.description: Returns the current in-memory effect count as denial and replay evidence.
tools.name: fixture.effect.count

tools.description: Waits for duration_ms or returns when the request context is canceled. Used for deterministic timeout and cancellation conformance.
tools.name: fixture.wait

tools.description: Deliberately terminates the fixture process during execution. Test-only destructive operation for transport and cleanup recovery.
tools.name: fixture.process.crash
